/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-exported_symbols_list,/Users/brumuchiuti/Downloads/SDL-Image-Processor/vendored/SDL_ttf/src/SDL_ttf.exports -compatibility_version 301.0.0 -current_version 301.0.0 -o ../../libSDL3_ttf.0.3.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libSDL3_ttf.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable_ttf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_gpu_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_renderer_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_surface_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_ttf.c.o"   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/12.3.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/12.3.2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/brumuchiuti/Downloads/SDL-Image-Processor/build ../../libSDL3.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/12.3.2/lib/libharfbuzz.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib
